summary: Comprehensive multi-layer test suite covering unit tests, workflow structure validation, and end-to-end act-based testing with exact output assertions. Validates core matrix generation, include/exclude rules, max-parallel, fail-fast, size limits, error handling, CLI behavior, and GitHub Actions workflow structure with actionlint. Main gaps: missing numeric boundary tests (max-parallel=0, exactly 256 jobs, negative values), incomplete validation of invalid value types, and test helper functions that duplicate cartesian/exclude logic from the implementation (creating fragile maintenance burden and potential divergence). The act-based test harness is well-engineered with clear expected-value assertions, but only covers 3 fixture cases. Would catch most regressions but some edge cases in numeric validation and config structure validation could slip through.
